facebook.caption: A perfect 5-star rating with 97 reviews is hard to argue with, and Mr. Viet Coffee at Kiot 20, 22 Đ. Lê Lợi in Phú Quốc is clearly doing something right. If you are searching for a genuine Vietnamese coffee experience on the island, this little spot is worth tracking down. Grab a cà phê sữa đá, slow down, and watch island life go by. Practical tip: the address sits in a kiot-style shophouse row, so look for the signage carefully and you will find it.
facebook.video_caption: Watch that iced coffee come together, layer by layer, the Vietnamese way. Mr. Viet Coffee on Đ. Lê Lợi keeps it real, no fuss, just great coffee and a welcoming vibe that keeps locals and travelers coming back. This is the kind of stop that earns every one of its five stars.

instagram.caption: Five stars. 97 reviews. Mr. Viet Coffee on Đ. Lê Lợi is proof that great coffee speaks for itself. Stop in, order an iced Vietnamese coffee, and let the island pace slow you down. Look for Kiot 20 on the shophouse row.
instagram.video_caption: That first sip of Vietnamese iced coffee hits different in Phu Quoc. Mr. Viet Coffee on Đ. Lê Lợi is earning every one of its five stars, one cup at a time.

tiktok.caption: The most underrated coffee stop in Phu Quoc? Mr. Viet Coffee on Đ. Lê Lợi. 5 stars, 97 reviews, and one very good iced coffee. #PhuQuocTravel #VietnameseCoffee #MrVietCoffee #VietnamTravel #CoffeeTok
